sections.title: Weekday Opening Hours
sections.content: All branches (Downtown, Maadi, New Cairo) are open Sunday to Thursday from 12:00 PM to 11:00 PM.

sections.title: Weekend Opening Hours
sections.content: On Friday and Saturday, all branches extend their hours and are open from 12:00 PM to 1:00 AM.

sections.title: Birthday and Private Events
sections.content: We host birthday events and small private gatherings at the Maadi and New Cairo branches only. Bookings require at least 48 hours notice and a minimum of 10 guests. A dedicated event coordinator will contact you after booking.

sections.title: Premium Catering Package
sections.content: The premium catering package includes a 5-course set menu, a dedicated waiter, table decoration, and a complimentary birthday cake for groups of 10 or more. It does not include alcoholic beverages. Price is quoted per guest count at time of booking.

sections.title: Refund Policy
sections.content: Refunds for pre-paid reservations are issued in full if cancelled at least 24 hours before the reservation time. Cancellations within 24 hours are refunded at 50%. No-shows are not eligible for a refund.

sections.title: Loyalty Program Overview
sections.content: Customers earn 1 loyalty point for every 10 EGP spent. Points can be redeemed at any branch starting from 500 points, equal to a 100 EGP discount on the next visit.
